SEARCH
Package simulator.model

Class Process

java.lang.Object
simulator.model.Process
Direct Known Subclasses:
SystemProcess, UserProcess
public abstract class Process extends Object
Abstract class defining the structure and base state of a process in the system. Serves as the foundation for both user processes and the system process. Manages information independent of the process type, such as the identifier, memory requirements, and its current state in the lifecycle.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected ProcessState
    currentState
    The current state of the process according to the simulator's state machine.
    protected final int
    id
    Unique identifier of the process (PID).
    protected int
    lastProcessorId
    The ID of the last processor the process ran on.
    protected final int
    requiredMemory
    The amount of RAM required for the process to be loaded from virtual memory (DISK).

  • Field Details

    • id

      protected final int id
      Unique identifier of the process (PID).

    • requiredMemory

      protected final int requiredMemory
      The amount of RAM required for the process to be loaded from virtual memory (DISK).

    • currentState

      protected ProcessState currentState
      The current state of the process according to the simulator's state machine.

    • lastProcessorId

      protected int lastProcessorId
      The ID of the last processor the process ran on. The initial value is -1, indicating the process hasn't been scheduled on any processor yet. This attribute is essential for implementing processor affinity logic.

  • Constructor Details

    • Process

      public Process(int id, int requiredMemory)
      Constructs a new process and initializes it in the NEW state.
      Parameters:
      id - The unique identifier of the process.
      requiredMemory - The memory required for execution.

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Returns the unique identifier of the process.
      Returns:
      The process ID.

    • getRequiredMemory

      public int getRequiredMemory()
      Returns the memory requirement of the process.
      Returns:
      Required memory in memory units.

    • getCurrentState

      public ProcessState getCurrentState()
      Returns the current state of the process.
      Returns:
      Current state (e.g., READY, RUNNING, WAITING_IO).

    • setState

      public void setState(ProcessState state)
      Updates the process state in the system.
      Parameters:
      state - The new state of the process.

    • getLastProcessorId

      public int getLastProcessorId()
      Returns the ID of the last processor the process was executed on.
      Returns:
      The processor ID or -1 if it has not yet run.

    • setLastProcessorId

      public void setLastProcessorId(int lastProcessorId)
      Sets the ID of the processor the process is currently running on.
      Parameters:
      lastProcessorId - The allocated processor ID.

    • executeTick

      public abstract void executeTick(int currentTime)
      Abstract method called at every time unit (tick) by the processor where the process is scheduled. Each type of process (User or System) must implement its own time consumption logic.
      Parameters:
      currentTime - The current global simulation time.
